# loadMetadata(completionHandler:)

**Instance Method**

Loads the array of metadata items from the media asset.

## Declaration

```swift
func loadMetadata(completionHandler: @escaping @Sendable ([AVMetadataItem]?, (any Error)?) -> Void)
```

```swift
func metadata() async throws -> [AVMetadataItem]
```

## Parameters

- **completionHandler**: The completion block to execute when the load operation finishes.

## Reading and parsing media assets

- **loadFileInfo(completionHandler:)**: Loads the file info object with the properties of the media asset.
- **loadTrackReaders(completionHandler:)**: Loads the array of track readers that represent the tracks in the media asset.
- **parseAdditionalFragments(completionHandler:)**: Incorporates additional fragments that the file received after the last time the format reader parsed it.
- **MEFormatReaderParseAdditionalFragmentsStatus**: Informational status flags that the format reader returns after parsing additional fragments.
